category_sources: Official README says oauth2l is a command-line tool for working with Google OAuth 2.0.
source_facts.description says it is a simple CLI for interacting with Google OAuth tokens.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README names the project oauth2l and explains its pronunciation.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents overview, quickstart, commands, and command options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/google/oauth2l; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes fetching OAuth 2.0 access tokens for Google APIs, service accounts, gcloud, and command-line workflows.
